$comment: Learning Hub module manifest. A self-contained capability that produces a monthly staff security-awareness MAGAZINE and, from that same edition, a derived interactive E-LEARNING course, then registers them as a 'publication' for a local Learning Dashboard. Follows the intelligence-product plugin contract (intelligence:true + autoImport:true) so install.sh creates its report dirs and the importer loads its workflows automatically. It does NOT modify or depend on any other module.
name: Learning Hub — Magazine, E-learning & Dashboard
description: One run produces a premium staff security-awareness magazine plus an interactive e-learning course derived strictly from that edition, registered as a publication. A local web Learning Dashboard lists publications, lets staff read the magazine anytime and complete the course within 30 days of release, shows completion status and a personal certificate library.

envVars.name: LEARNING_HUB_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'false' to disable the scheduled publication run.

envVars.name: LEARNING_HUB_SCHEDULE_CRON
envVars.description: Cron schedule for the edition (default 07:00 on the 1st of each month).

envVars.name: LEARNING_HUB_PASS_MARK
envVars.description: Knowledge-check pass mark (%) for the derived course.

envVars.name: LEARNING_HUB_SOURCES_FILE
envVars.description: Awareness source feeds (one URL per line).

envVars.name: DASHBOARD_PORT
envVars.description: Host port for the local Learning Dashboard (nginx).
